function.name: get_classes_info
function.description: Get students enrolled in a class using its class code (e.g. 'MATH101')

class_code.description: The short class code e.g. 'MATH101', NOT the full name like 'Math 101', Spaces are not allowed in the class code

class_code.description: class codes are always in lower case, and no spaces allowed, user can give Math101, math101 both means same
